title: 2015 Press Releases
summary: This is an index page listing all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2015, including items related to banking applications, enforcement actions, regulatory policy, and monetary policy. The page does not contain individual source documents but rather links to them. As a historical record from 2015 (approximately 11 years old), it is stale and not useful as a primary research source.
key_points: This is a listing/aggregation page of Federal Reserve press releases, not a standalone document
Contains links to various Fed business items from throughout 2015
Notable items visible include FOMC statements from December 16 and October 28, 2015
Page lists enforcement actions, banking applications, regulatory policy updates, and other Fed announcements
Source is stale (2015 vintage) and exceeds the 90-day recency threshold by approximately 11 years
why_it_matters: This listing page has no direct market or macro relevance as an information source. It is a navigation index that would point to individual press releases. The individual FOMC statements and rate decisions from 2015 would be the relevant primary sources for market structure and macro catalyst research, not this aggregation page.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page (index of 2015 press releases), explicitly excluded from archival per rule 5
Source contains no primary content - only links to individual press releases
Source published 2015-12-31, approximately 11 years before TODAY (2026-03-31), making it stale
event_type set to 'unknown' but should not be any event type since this is a container page, not an archiveable source
No extractable macro catalyst or market structure content
Individual FOMC statements, rate decisions, and other substantive Fed releases from 2015 should be archived separately as primary sources

notes: Non-archiveable: This is a listing/aggregation page of Federal Reserve press releases from 2015, not a standalone document. Contains no extractable market structure or macro catalyst information. Historical record from 2015 (stale). Individual FOMC statements and press releases from 2015 should be identified and archived as separate, primary sources if needed for research.
